decision.reason: Raj and Mira approve conditional fixed-target SLB evidence capture only. DashThis cancellation remains blocked until G1-G12 evidence, parity, export, delivery, hardening, and final recommendation gates pass.

notes: Accept cross-stream SLB cancellation-readiness as an evidence track, not a runtime failure.
G1-G11 may proceed only as conditional evidence capture.
DashThis stays active and cancellation remains no_go.
Accept additive report/dashboard schema and snapshot architecture with followups.
Preview, diagnostics, scheduled dry-run, and export gating must remain stored-aggregate only.
Meta sync and backfill are upstream remediation only and must not run during preview or export.

required_followups.description: Fill and validate one fixed May 2026 credentialed staging runtime target with redacted tenant/client/account/page/workspace scope, timezone, currency, dry-run-only delivery, and Instagram deferred.
Prove retained stored aggregate rows for paid Meta Ads, organic Facebook/Page, top posts, and Content Ops for the fixed May 2026 range and 90-day readiness, or document approved dbt/retention gaps.
Before treating exports as parity proof, prove CSV/PDF/PNG artifacts render from the report.v1 snapshot payload with matching preview hashes, non-empty artifact bytes, and safe metadata.
Polish the report review UI, diagnostics, coverage notes, scheduled dry-run states, adversarial review packet, and 24-48 hour hardening evidence before final recommendation.

preflight_interpretation.contract_warning_route: Sofia and Andre review additive reporting/backfill evidence behavior before G2-G9 evidence is treated as parity proof.
preflight_interpretation.security_pii_warning_route: Nina reviews export artifacts and evidence files before G10/G12 to confirm no secrets, addresses, tokens, or user-level data are present.

decision_log.summary: Approved conditional cross-stream SLB cancellation-readiness evidence capture with followups. DashThis cancellation remains no_go.
Approved additive report architecture for fixed-target evidence capture with followups. Preview and export must remain stored-aggregate only.
